title: plumeria dupliciflora
intro: Plumeria dupliciflora, also known as the double-fringed plumeria or double-flowered frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, characterized by its unique double flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Plumeria dupliciflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of fever and cough. Plumeria dupliciflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in aromatherapy and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
